//: Generated by the context-engineering skill — safe to hand-edit; re-running the skill regenerates the scaffold shape and asks before overwriting your changes. Exception: the 'hooks' block enforces load-bearing rules from CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md as actual guarantees (hook scripts live in .claude/hooks/), so edit it only if you understand the consequences — these turn prose into enforcement.
//hooks-source: See .claude/hooks/README.md for what each hook does and why.
//permissions: Read-only allowlist seeded by context-engineering to cut permission prompts for safe inspection commands. Writes/commits/pushes are intentionally NOT here — they run under the Autonomy charter and any commit-blocking hooks. Grow this with the fewer-permission-prompts skill.

PreToolUse.//: Hook: block-env-commit. matcher=Bash; the script reads the stdin payload and blocks only staging of .env files. No 'if' filter — scoping lives in the script (see .claude/hooks/README.md). Always emitted.
Hook: block-deploy-cli. matcher=Bash; the script scopes itself to Vercel CLI invocations ('vercel …', 'npx vercel …'). Emitted because deploy_target_has_cli_conflict == true.
Hook: block-worktree. matcher=Bash; the script scopes itself to 'git worktree' commands. Emitted because uses_visual_confirmation_gate == true.

Hook: block-worktree. Catches Claude Code's EnterWorktree tool. (Whether Agent isolation:worktree surfaces a PreToolUse event is undocumented — do not assume coverage.) Emitted because uses_visual_confirmation_gate == true.
